title: Cherry Cape Elytra Item
description: Makes the Elytra Item look like the Cherry Cape (For Parity or just other use)
body:
### This resource pack makes the Elytra Item look like the Cherry Cape

This only changes the item, **not the model**. The texture was created by myself but I used the textures from the Cape and was inspired by **_Villagers** on PlanetMinecraft. It changes all elytra items, not just yours. There is a Broken Elytra Item texture

I have a Youtube Channel btw, it's called @TomatoFacex1
